examples: For a labrador retriever, this turns out to be 4.3 Hz.
Refresh rates are measured in Hz, or cycles per second.
The HZ value has been increased to 1000 for x86 architecture.
When combined with the company's 240 Hz technology, the display can refresh 480 images per second.
To compare, standard mechanical timepieces run at a frequency of 28, 800 vph (4 Hz).
